category_sources: source_facts.description identifies Flix as a statically typed functional, imperative, and logic programming language; official site describes Flix as a programming language.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is flix; official website and repository title use Flix.
docs_sources: Official Programming Flix documentation at doc.flix.dev is the dedicated documentation site referenced from official Flix materials.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo was intentionally not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names static typing plus functional, imperative, and logic paradigms; official docs state Flix compiles to JVM bytecode.
